description: Synchronous response body for POST /v1/fix/ir (inline IR scaffold generation). Unlike other fix endpoints this is a synchronous 200 response returning the scaffold path immediately; no run record is created. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class FixIRResponse.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the written IR scaffold file.
